name: 都市媚影-CityFascination
developer: 重瞳鸢工作室[Heavy Pupil Kite Studio]
publisher: 赛里斯游戏工作室 [Sinae  Game Studio]
short_description: city fascination is a modern urban RPG set in a parallel world. In different life levels to make their own choice, is hand in hand with a confidante bland through life, or?
detailed_description:
This is a role-playing single-player game with the background of parallel world.
Players in the game as a recent college graduate, after becoming an ordinary office worker
After becoming an ordinary working person, whether you spend your life in a mediocre way or go out with your lover to have a wonderful life.
What you become ultimately depends on yourself.

Game content
Includes a pixelated game plot flow
Turn-based character combat

Polished and optimized storyline:
The plot is described in multiple points only,
Full storyline with 6 main characters and various events with various other characters
Each female character's story is optimized for differentiation and non-overlap
The story of the player and the main character will be staggered in the flow

Get to know your soulmate

The AI assistant that accompanies you

Get out of your wonderful life
